summary: No contradiction or counter-evidence search was performed because the claim is limited to the article's editorial method and framing.
limits: This pack must not be used to prove external trade, tariff, supply-chain, or consumer-price claims without adding external sources.

summary: This PR added one source supporting the EU low-value parcel duty point. It did not perform a wider counter-source search.
limits: Do not treat this as complete fact-checking. Primary EU sources and consumer-impact evidence are still needed for publication use.

search_scope: single official European Commission source only
summary: This PR added one official EU source supporting the context around low-value consignments and customs reform. It did not perform a wider counter-source search.
limits: Do not treat this as full publication fact-checking. Further sources are needed for consumer impact and historic outsourcing claims.

summary: This PR added one consumer-impact context source on cheapflation and poorer households' grocery-price exposure. It did not perform a wider counter-source search.
limits: Do not treat this as proof that EU parcel duties will have the same effect as grocery cheapflation. The source supports consumer-impact logic only.

summary: This PR added one platform-use context source on Shein, Temu, lower-income shoppers, and online bargain-seeking. It did not perform a wider counter-source search.
limits: Do not treat this as proof of UK low-income dependence on these platforms or direct EU-duty consumer impact. It is platform-use context only.

summary: This PR added one customs-duty pass-through context source on tariff incidence and domestic consumer/business cost exposure. It did not perform a wider counter-source search.
limits: Do not treat this as proof of the EU low-value parcel duty pass-through rate, direct platform price increases, or measured impact on poorer consumers. It is pass-through context only.
